title: Blackrock Yellow Hard Hat, Safety Helmet, For Construction, Mens Womens Unisex, Work Hats, Builder, One Size Adjustable Head Strap, HDPE Protection, UK/EU 2016/425 EN937:2012+A1:2012
features: SAFETY: The custom HDPE shell is designed to absorb the energy of a blow, offering secure protection for the user. Available in White, Blue, Yellow, Red, Black and Orange.
SECURE FIT: Featuring a 6 point multi-position adjust suspension harness, the helmet can be positioned and edited to protect all head sizes and shapes
COMFORT: The integral sweatband has been built-in to the forehead of the hat to maximise wearability, ensuring that the wearer can keep the helmet on for long periods without rubbing and discomfort
ACCESSORIES: Featuring attachment points for both a chin strap and ear muffs, the helmet enables wearers to further advance their security and protection
PEACE OF MIND: Certified to international standards by UK government-approved testing companies - when it comes to protection, you’re in safe hands with Blackrock
